id.description: The ID of the access log subscription.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the access log subscription.

resourceId.description: The ID of the service network or service.

resourceArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the service network or service.

destinationArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the access log destination.

serviceNetworkLogType.description: The log type for the service network.

createdAt.description: The date and time that the access log subscription was created, in ISO-8601 format.

lastUpdatedAt.description: The date and time that the access log subscription was last updated, in ISO-8601 format.

state.description: The state of the auth policy. The auth policy is only active when the auth type is set to AWS_IAM. If you provide a policy, then authentication and authorization decisions are made based on this policy and the client's IAM policy. If the auth type is NONE, then any auth policy that you provide remains inactive. For more information, see Create a service network in the Amazon VPC Lattice User Guide.

createdAt.description: The date and time that the auth policy was created, in ISO-8601 format.

lastUpdatedAt.description: The date and time that the auth policy was last updated, in ISO-8601 format.

id.description: The ID of the domain verification.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the domain verification.

status.description: The current status of the domain verification process.

txtMethodConfig.description: The TXT record configuration used for domain verification.

createdAt.description: The date and time that the domain verification was created, in ISO-8601 format.

lastVerifiedTime.description: The date and time that the domain was last successfully verified, in ISO-8601 format.

tags.description: The tags associated with the domain verification.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the listener.

serviceArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the service.

defaultAction.description: The actions for the default listener rule.

createdAt.description: The date and time that the listener was created, in ISO-8601 format.

lastUpdatedAt.description: The date and time that the listener was last updated, in ISO-8601 format.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the resource configuration.

resourceGatewayId.description: The ID of the resource gateway used to connect to the resource configuration in a given VPC. You can specify the resource gateway identifier only for resource configurations with type SINGLE, GROUP, or ARN.

resourceConfigurationGroupId.description: The ID of the group resource configuration.

type.description:
The type of resource configuration.

  • SINGLE - A single resource.

  • GROUP - A group of resources.

  • CHILD - A single resource that is part of a group resource configuration.

  • ARN - An Amazon Web Services resource.

allowAssociationToShareableServiceNetwor.description: Specifies whether the resource configuration is associated with a sharable service network.

portRanges.description: The TCP port ranges that a consumer can use to access a resource configuration. You can separate port ranges with a comma. Example: 1-65535 or 1,2,22-30

protocol.description: The TCP protocol accepted by the specified resource configuration.

customDomainName.description: The custom domain name of the resource configuration.

createdAt.description: The date and time that the resource configuration was created, in ISO-8601 format.

amazonManaged.description: Indicates whether the resource configuration was created and is managed by Amazon.

lastUpdatedAt.description: The most recent date and time that the resource configuration was updated, in ISO-8601 format.

domainVerificationArn.description: The ARN of the domain verification.

groupDomain.description: (GROUP) The group domain for a group resource configuration. Any domains that you create for the child resource are subdomains of the group domain. Child resources inherit the verification status of the domain.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the resource gateway.

vpcId.description: The ID of the VPC for the resource gateway.

subnetIds.description: The IDs of the VPC subnets for resource gateway.

securityGroupIds.description: The security group IDs associated with the resource gateway.

ipAddressType.description: The type of IP address for the resource gateway.

ipv4AddressesPerEni.description: The number of IPv4 addresses in each ENI for the resource gateway.

createdAt.description: The date and time that the resource gateway was created, in ISO-8601 format.

lastUpdatedAt.description: The date and time that the resource gateway was last updated, in ISO-8601 format.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the listener.

isDefault.description: Indicates whether this is the default rule.

priority.description: The priority level for the specified rule.

createdAt.description: The date and time that the listener rule was created, in ISO-8601 format.

lastUpdatedAt.description: The date and time that the listener rule was last updated, in ISO-8601 format.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the service.

createdAt.description: The date and time that the service was created, in ISO-8601 format.

lastUpdatedAt.description: The date and time that the service was last updated, in ISO-8601 format.

customDomainName.description: The custom domain name of the service.

certificateArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the certificate.

createdAt.description: The date and time that the service network was created, in ISO-8601 format.

lastUpdatedAt.description: The date and time of the last update, in ISO-8601 format.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the service network.

sharingConfig.description: Specifies if the service network is enabled for sharing.

numberOfAssociatedVPCs.description: The number of VPCs associated with the service network.

numberOfAssociatedServices.description: The number of services associated with the service network.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the association.

createdAt.description: The date and time that the association was created, in ISO-8601 format.

resourceConfigurationId.description: The ID of the resource configuration that is associated with the service network.

resourceConfigurationArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the association.

resourceConfigurationName.description: The name of the resource configuration that is associated with the service network.

serviceNetworkId.description: The ID of the service network that is associated with the resource configuration.

serviceNetworkArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the service network that is associated with the resource configuration.

serviceNetworkName.description: The name of the service network that is associated with the resource configuration.

lastUpdatedAt.description: The most recent date and time that the association was updated, in ISO-8601 format.

privateDnsEntry.description: The private DNS entry for the service.

privateDnsEnabled.description: Indicates if private DNS is enabled in the service network resource association.

isManagedAssociation.description: Indicates whether the association is managed by Amazon.

domainVerificationStatus.description: The domain verification status in the service network resource association.

id.description: The ID of the service network and service association.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the association.

createdAt.description: The date and time that the association was created, in ISO-8601 format.

serviceArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the service.

serviceNetworkArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the service network.

customDomainName.description: The custom domain name of the service.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the association.

createdAt.description: The date and time that the association was created, in ISO-8601 format.

serviceNetworkArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the service network.

privateDnsEnabled.description: Indicates if private DNS is enabled in the VPC association.

lastUpdatedAt.description: The date and time that the association was last updated, in ISO-8601 format.

dnsOptions.description: DNS options for the service network VPC association.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the target group.

createdAt.description: The date and time that the target group was created, in ISO-8601 format.

lastUpdatedAt.description: The date and time that the target group was last updated, in ISO-8601 format.

serviceArns.description: The Amazon Resource Names (ARNs) of the service.

items.description: Information about the association between the VPC endpoint and service network.
